{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Consultant's Guild chapter house
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultant's Guild chapter house]] is a white, arching building with glass panes stained with the garden shear crest of the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
